_comment: Device registry — source of truth for device -> antenna -> filter -> band -> domain -> endpoint. Replaces the RF switch. The pi-acquisition provisioner iterates `present: true` devices only; flip present + re-apply to join a new tuner. See docs/acquisition_tier.md and docs/PLATFORM_V2_ARCHITECTURE.md.

_antenna_ports._comment: RSPdx-R2 is a single tuner with 3 software-selectable antenna inputs (one band at a time). 'antenna'/'feed'/'filter' above describe the ACTIVE port (A, the FM job). Port B is now EMPTY (the dipole + Sawbird+ NOAA LNA were removed 2026-06-16 for troubleshooting on a separate Pi, taking the interim Meteor/NOAA path with them — no replacement until an RTL v4 is acquired). Port C carries the AM long-wire, consumed by radio-compute's am_stream.py over the remote dx-R2 (the eventual AM home is the HF+, deferred until its YouLoop + the radio-compute AM rewire).
_antenna_ports.Antenna B: (empty — dipole + Sawbird+ NOAA LNA removed to the attic 2026-06-16)

hf-plus._comment: Airspy HF+ — attached 2026-06-16, served on the Pi (sdr-source@hf-plus :55002, SoapyAirspyHF built by the pi provisioner). Interim antenna is a WHIP until the YouLoop arrives. NOTE: present:true makes the pi-acquisition provisioner lay down its source server, but the radio-compute AM consumer still reads the dx-R2 long-wire (Antenna C) — moving AM onto the HF+ is a deliberate radio-compute follow-up (touches the live FM stream), not yet done.

rtl-2838._comment: RETIRED 2026-06-16 — the Nooelec RTL2838 was physically removed (taken to the attic for troubleshooting on a separate Pi). Its discone moved to the Airspy R2. Scanner P25 cut over to airspy-r2 in the same change (present:false here, airspy-r2 present:true). Kept in the registry for history/rollback; the device is not plugged in.

airspy-r2._comment: LIVE scanner source as of 2026-06-16 — carries the discone (moved off the retired rtl-2838). Gain elements are LNA/MIX/VGA (0-15 each), NOT the R820T 'TUNER' element — op25 run-op25.sh GAINS is hand-set on .83 accordingly. Native CS16, rates 2.5/10 MSps (held at 2.5).

rtl-v4._comment: NOT acquired yet (2026-06-16). The Meteor/NOAA path it would own is currently DARK — the V-dipole + Sawbird+ NOAA LNA were removed to the attic on 2026-06-16, and the Pi wxsat-scheduler is paused until an RTL v4 + antenna return. Feed/filter below describe the intended setup, not what is plugged in. SUPERSEDED for the Meteor role by nooelec-wx on p24 (the dipole moved there with the Nooelec) — kept for history.

nooelec-wx._comment: Nooelec NESDR SMArt v5 (RTL2838, Meteor V-dipole) on the OUTDOOR ADS-B Pi p24.srvr (192.168.6.141), NOT the radio acquisition Pi. Added 2026-06-17 alongside p24's two ADS-B dongles (1090 @ serial 00001090, UAT 978 @ serial 00000001). DEDICATED to weather-sat / NWR — never shared with ADS-B. p24 serves it to the rack as rtl_tcp (CU8); radio-compute's SatDump (librtltcp_support) decodes Meteor LRPT live over the LAN — all decode + storage on the rack. Serial is the FACTORY-UNIQUE 22012952 (NESDR SMARts ship unique — no collision with the ADS-B dongles, so no EEPROM reflash; selection is by this serial). dvb_usb_rtl28xxu is blacklisted so librtlsdr keeps it. The 'wxsat' domain keeps it out of radio-compute's existing radio_devices loops. NOTE 2026-06-18: p24's USB bus is power-marginal (repeated enumerate error -71) — needs a POWERED hub before it holds the dongle reliably.
